title: Creamy Russian Pilaf
description: A rich and buttery twist on traditional pilaf, inspired by Russian cuisine. This dish is perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Russian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the uncooked white rice and stir to combine.
Cook for 1-2 minutes, until the rice is lightly toasted.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
